# QuickBot — Pricing

## Plans

| Plan       | Price                   |
|------------|-------------------------|
| Starter    | $99 / month             |
| Growth     | $499 / month            |
| Custom     | Contact us              |

## What's included

- Unlimited agent runs
- All features
- Best-effort support

## Limits

- No hard step or token limits — our agents stop when they're done.
- Cost is included in your plan; no surprises.

## Support

- Email support (24-48h response).
- Slack channel for paying customers.

## Terms

Standard ToS at quickbot.ai/terms. No formal SLA at this time. Contact us for enterprise terms.
